title: Interpret Exchange Status Information From the Tote Task Interface
summary: Use the Tote Task interface to identify exchange-related status information shown for a tote task, including exchange type, priority indication, original destination, readiness for exchange, and any displayed indication that an AGV is behind it ready to go.
when_to_use: Use this runbook when reviewing the Tote Task interface to understand the exchange-related values displayed for a tote's current task.
not_for: Do not use this runbook to infer exchange logic or make operational decisions beyond the values explicitly shown on the interface.
Do not use this runbook if the exchange-related fields are not visible and cannot be confirmed from the Tote Task interface.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Review the Tote Task interface and interpret the displayed exchange-related fields exactly as shown.

safety_notes: This source describes screen interpretation only.
Do not infer exchange logic or operational decisions beyond the values explicitly shown in the source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the Tote Task interface
Visibility of exchange-related fields on the Tote Task screen

access_required: Access to the Tote Task interface
system_preconditions: The Tote Task interface for the tote being reviewed is open or visible.
Exchange-related fields are visible on the Tote Task screen.

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the Tote Tasks Aveva API page and transcript-supported exchange-related fields including exchange type, priority, original destination, readiness for exchange, and AGV-behind-ready indication.

steps.title: Open or view the Tote Task interface
steps.purpose: Access the screen that displays tote task and exchange-related information.
steps.instruction: Open or view the Tote Task interface for the tote being reviewed.
steps.expected_result: The Tote Task interface is visible for the tote under review.
steps.healthy_condition: The Tote Task interface is open and current task details are visible.
steps.failure_condition: The Tote Task interface cannot be opened or the tote's task details are not visible.

actions.label: View Tote Task interface
actions.exact_action: Open or view the Tote Task interface for the tote being reviewed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Tote Tasks Aveva API page showing current task details and exchange-related information.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the exchange-related fields are not visible.
Escalate if the Tote Task interface for the tote being reviewed cannot be confirmed.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The Tote Task interface offers insight into tote movements within the warehouse.
Slide title appears as Tote Tasks Aveva API page.

steps.title: Locate exchange-related information
steps.purpose: Identify the part of the interface that shows exchange status for the current task.
steps.instruction: Locate the exchange-related information shown for the current task, including what kind of exchange type it is doing.
steps.expected_result: The exchange-related fields for the current task are identified on screen.
steps.healthy_condition: The interface clearly shows exchange-related information for the current task.
steps.failure_condition: Exchange-related information is not visible or cannot be distinguished from other task details.

actions.exact_action: Locate the exchange-related information shown for the current task, including what kind of exchange type it is doing.

steps.title: Observe any AGV-behind-ready indication
steps.purpose: Capture any additional readiness-related indication about an AGV behind the tote.
steps.instruction: Observe whether the interface indicates an AGV behind it ready to go, if that information is displayed.
steps.expected_result: Any displayed indication that an AGV is behind it ready to go is noted exactly as shown.

steps.failure_condition: The AGV-behind-ready indication is not displayed, is ambiguous, or cannot be matched to a labeled field.

steps.title: Record the displayed exchange values exactly as shown
steps.purpose: Preserve the exchange-related status information without interpretation.
steps.instruction: Record the displayed exchange type and readiness-related values exactly as shown.
steps.expected_result: The displayed exchange type, priority indication, original destination, readiness-for-exchange status, and any AGV-behind-ready indication are documented exactly as displayed.
steps.healthy_condition: Values are captured directly from the interface without inference.
steps.failure_condition: Values are inferred, paraphrased beyond recognition, or cannot be confirmed from the screen.

actions.label: Document displayed values
actions.exact_action: Record the displayed exchange type and readiness-related values exactly as shown.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Exchange-related values to capture exactly as displayed on the Tote Task interface.

stop_or_escalate_if: Escalate if the exchange-related fields are not visible.
Escalate if their meaning is unclear from the interface.
Stop and do not infer exchange logic or operational decisions beyond the values explicitly shown in the source.

source_evidence.quote_or_summary: The screen shows what kind of exchange type it's doing, whether the exchange is a priority, its original destination, and if it's ready for exchange.

source_evidence.note: Do not infer exchange logic or operational decisions beyond the values explicitly shown in the source.

success_criteria: The user identifies the displayed exchange type from the Tote Task interface.
The user identifies whether the exchange is shown as priority.
The user identifies the Original Destination value.
The user identifies whether the tote is shown as ready for exchange.
If displayed, the user notes whether the interface indicates an AGV behind it ready to go.
All values are recorded exactly as shown without inference.
healthy_conditions: The Tote Task interface is visible for the tote being reviewed.
Exchange-related fields are visible on the screen.
Displayed values can be read directly from the interface.
Recorded values match the interface exactly.
failure_conditions: The meaning of displayed fields is unclear from the interface.
Original Destination or readiness-related values cannot be read.
The AGV-behind-ready indication is ambiguous or unlabeled.
The reviewer infers logic or decisions beyond what is explicitly shown.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the exchange-related fields are not visible or their meaning is unclear from the interface.
Escalate if expected exchange status information cannot be confirmed directly from the Tote Task screen.
Do not infer exchange logic or operational decisions beyond the values explicitly shown in the source.

missing_details: The source does not provide exact field labels for all exchange-related values.
